subcategory: multi-tier pricing plans with feature comparison
use_cases: Display pricing tiers for SaaS subscription models with feature breakdowns
Show animated price transitions when users interact with plan options
Celebrate plan selection with confetti effects on user clicks
Compare features across multiple pricing tiers in a visual layout
Drive conversions with interactive pricing cards that respond to hover and selection
ai_summary: A sophisticated pricing section component featuring animated price displays using NumberFlow, celebratory confetti effects on plan selection, and smooth scroll-triggered animations. Built with Framer Motion and Tailwind CSS, this component supports multiple pricing tiers with feature comparisons and call-to-action buttons. Designed for SaaS and subscription-based applications requiring engaging pricing presentations that drive user conversions.
